---
title: "GBBO Winners"
date: 2024-09-30
categories: [GBBO, Infographic]
image: images/GBBO_Gender_Barplot.png
description: "Comparison of GBBO winners by gender"
---

![](images/GBBO_Gender_Barplot.png){.lightbox width="50%"}

## About

GBBO analysis: Have more men or women won previous series of GBBO?
It's an even split!  7 men and 7 women have won previous series.  
On the plot, each cupcake represents 1 baker  
Plot generated in adobe illustrator
